raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/XXXX my credit card issued by Citicard was charged {$99.00} by XXXX for an antivirus software I did not use any more. I filed a dispute and was resolved in my favor. 
Again in XX/XX/XXXX my credit card was charged {$100.00} by XXXX. I also filed a dispute to Citicard. This time Citicard resolved that I had to pay {$100.00} for something I did not use since last year.The same issue but different resolutions. 
I don't agree with Citicard 's resolution.
